channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Lots of broken glass on pavement, 5th April
item.description:
Lots of broken glass on pavement. I think it’s been there for a couple of days, as far as I know.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 125, Great Suffolk Street, The Borough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lots of broken glass on pavement, 5th April
item.description:
Lots of broken glass on pavement. I think it’s been there for a couple of days, as far as I know.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 125, Great Suffolk Street, The Borough, Greater London

item.title: Rubbish at entrance to alley/garden gates, 5th April
item.description:
Rubbish at entrance to alley/garden gates.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Town Road, Edmonton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large flytip causing right of disabled access, 5th April
item.description:
Large flytip which was done at some point today, this is now putting vulnerable household at risk as we park in the rear of our property and can’t get out, our son is disabled and this is vital it’s kept clear. It is a protected right of access. We have located a Bromley address on two separate boxes within the pile. Please contact the landowner Axmo Homes Limited to deal with or get us their details as we can’t locate them online. This could put my sons life at risk

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 61, Chesterfield Close, St Mary Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dog fouling, 5th April
item.description:
A local resident’s dog has fouled in the location showed in the attached photo.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Helsinki Square, Rotherhithe, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Kilburn high road to 31 Brondesbury’s villas, 5th April
item.description:
Covered in rubbish

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Brondesbury Villas, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bulky Waste Disposal, 5th April
item.description:
Since the Community Disposal Unit has been removed. Property 79 have had problems with bulky waste being deposited outside the premises. 79 have contacted the council. However the issue is an ongoing dispute investigation. Please arrange collection of the bulky waste being deposited That consists of bags of waste building materials broken chairs and some electrical goods and equipment. My understanding is that the persons have moved on . Thank you
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 95-110, Burder Close, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Brondesbury villas Greggs and fruit stand, 5th April
item.description:
Graffiti

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kilburn High Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 5th April
item.description:
2 doors and hugeplastic blue sheet dumped by shurbs in edible garden

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Maran Way, West Heath, Greater London

item.title: Fly tipped waste, 5th April
item.description:
Everything not in a bin has been tipped in front and behind the gate

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Cricketfield Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Road defects, pot holes all down doveney close, 5th April
item.description:
Lose debris from pot holes in the road. Road is used more frequently due school runs and has increased heavy use. Pot holes are deep and breaking up causing debris to fly onto pavements and proving rough to drive on fire all residents.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 7, Buttermere Road, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped sack full of cans, 5th April
item.description:
A bin bag full of bear cans in the bush next to the parking bay with lines drawn on it for parking. Been there for weeks and not taken away. The dog bin is broken and needs to be replaced as it keeps falling over and is dangerous if it lands on someone's foot or pet.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 7, Buttermere Road, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish, 5th April
item.description:
Lots of rubbish and bins full.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 7, Buttermere Road, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Road work fencing and signs mess, 5th April
item.description:
The construction fencing and signage on Homerton Road near Mabley Green have all come down and are across the streets. This has caused a hazard along the road and pavements. With ongoing high winds this is quite dangerous

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Studley Close, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbiah, 5th April
item.description:
Dumped stuff furniture etc

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kingsland Road, Hackney, London

item.title: Abandoned car, 5th April
item.description:
Abandoned car is SORN and left in public parking which is illegal. Has no MOT and probably no insurance.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Alsike Road, West Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tippping, 5th April
item.description:

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Simnel Road, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Damaged manhole cover, 5th April
item.description:
Outside of 304 Brook Street the manhole cover in the road seems to be subsiding. Tjis has been getting worse since the 99 and 180 bus routes have been rerouted along Brook Street
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Brook Street, Northumberland Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
